issues.explanation: The paragraph claims short-term investments of $51,951,000,000, but this figure is not found in any of the cited chunks (aa5327bc-c0f8-4853-8d2a-3d41ccc9877b or 4bc124d0-55c5-43b2-8ab4-271e8fceebfa). Chunk aa5327bc only contains cash & equivalents ($10,605,000,000), and chunk 4bc124d0 only contains total debt ($11,412,000,000). No evidence supports the short-term investments figure.
issues.recommended_fix: Either remove the short-term investments claim entirely, or locate and cite the correct chunk containing short-term investments data. If short-term investments should be included in net debt calculation, update the calculation accordingly.

issues.offending_span: Total debt of $11,412,000,000 is substantially covered by cash and equivalents of $10,605,000,000 plus short-term investments of $51,951,000,000, resulting in net debt of only $807,000,000
issues.explanation: The cited calculation (CALC_ID: 36dc1d31-f0f0-44e7-b628-679358946106) computes net debt as total_debt (11,412,000,000) - cash (10,605,000,000) = 807,000,000. This calculation does NOT include short-term investments. The text claims net debt results from subtracting both cash AND short-term investments, but the calculation only subtracts cash. If short-term investments of $51,951,000,000 were actually included, net debt would be approximately -$51,144,000,000, not $807,000,000.
issues.recommended_fix: Revise the text to accurately reflect the calculation methodology. Either: (1) Remove mention of short-term investments from the net debt explanation, stating only cash and equivalents are used; or (2) If short-term investments should be included, update the calculation to include them and report the correct net debt figure.
